findings: Found 3 new managed-artifact drift issues: root AGENTS managed block stale, Codex/Cursor hook config order drift, and docs still saying Cursor hooks are pending.

issues_found.title: Root AGENTS managed bootstrap block is stale relative to BOOTSTRAP_CANONICAL
issues_found.description: The checked-in root AGENTS.md managed block begins with a shorter store-only text at AGENTS.md:13, but the canonical installer source starts different byte-locked content at packages/shared/src/templates/bootstrap-canonical.ts:63, and install tests require the AGENTS.md managed body to byte-equal the .fabric/AGENTS.md snapshot/BOOTSTRAP_CANONICAL at packages/cli/__tests__/integration/install-skills-and-hooks.test.ts:679 and :764. This means the active Codex policy file in the repo is not what a fresh install would generate.
issues_found.fix_direction: Regenerate the root AGENTS.md managed block from BOOTSTRAP_CANONICAL/.fabric/AGENTS.md and add a repo-level drift check that compares checked-in AGENTS.md managed body against the canonical snapshot.

issues_found.title: Checked-in Codex and Cursor hook configs reverse the template PreToolUse hook order
issues_found.description: The hook config templates install knowledge-hint-narrow before cite-policy-evict for Codex and Cursor (packages/cli/templates/hooks/configs/codex-hooks.json:13, packages/cli/templates/hooks/configs/cursor-hooks.json:10), but the checked-in .codex/hooks.json and .cursor/hooks.json put cite-policy-evict first (.codex/hooks.json:14, .cursor/hooks.json:14). Installer code merges from those templates, so the dogfood configs no longer represent a fresh install.
issues_found.fix_direction: Regenerate .codex/hooks.json and .cursor/hooks.json from the hook config templates, or make the intended order explicit in templates/tests and add a drift assertion for checked-in client configs.

issues_found.title: Docs still describe Cursor hook support as pending even though installer and checked-in configs install Cursor hooks
issues_found.description: docs/initialization.md still says Phase 4 writes only .claude/.codex hooks and that Cursor has no Stop-hook surface as of 2026-05 (docs/initialization.md:25 and :222), and docs/roadmap.md still tracks Cursor Stop-hook support as pending (docs/roadmap.md:113). Current installer destinations include .cursor/hooks/fabric-hint.cjs at packages/cli/src/install/skills-and-hooks.ts:186, and the checked-in Cursor config wires stop/sessionStart/preToolUse hooks at .cursor/hooks.json:4.
issues_found.fix_direction: Update initialization/roadmap docs to state Cursor hooks are currently installed, including stop/sessionStart/preToolUse/postToolUse/sessionEnd as appropriate; move the old pending note to explicit historical migration context if needed.
